goal: exists(k0: Real) { Set.singleton(a).contains(k0) and k0.is_close(x, eps) }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_eps_adherent_to_set(x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ x0 and k0.is_close(x1, x2) } }(Set.singleton(a), x, eps)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.singleton[T0](x0) = (x0 = x1) }[Real](a, y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(x, a, eps)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Real](eps, (x - a).abs)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](eps, (x - a).abs)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.singleton[T0](x0) = (x0 = x1) }[Real](a, x)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(x0, x1) or x1 ∈ x0 } = is_closed_set(x0) }(Set.singleton(a))
let w0: Real satisfy { is_adherent_point_of_set(Set.singleton(a), w0) and not w0 ∈ Set.singleton(a) }
function(x0: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(Set.singleton(a), x0) or x0 ∈ Set.singleton(a) }(w0)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.singleton[T0](x0) = (x0 = x1) }[Real](a, a)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.singleton[T0](x0) = (x0 = x1) }[Real](a, y)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { Set.singleton(a).contains(x0) and x0 != a implies not x0.is_close(a, k0) } }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ Set.singleton(a) or x1 = a or not x1.is_close(a, x0) }) }(1)
function(x0: Real) { not forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ Set.singleton(a) or x1 = a or not x1.is_close(a, x0) } or not x0.is_positive }(1)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 ∈ Set.singleton(a) and w0 != a and w0.is_close(a, 1) }
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ Set.singleton(a) or a = x0 or false = true }(w0)
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ Set.singleton(a) or a = x0 }(w0)
w0 ∈ Set.singleton(a) and a != w0 and w0.is_close(a, 1)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ Set.singleton(a) or x0 = a or not x0.is_close(a, w0) } }

function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1 = x2 or not x2.is_close(x1, k0) } }) = is_isolated_point_of_set(x0, x1) }(Set.singleton(a), a)
not (a ∈ Set.singleton(a) and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ Set.singleton(a) or x1 = a or not x1.is_close(a, k0) } })
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { is_adherent_point_of_set(x0 ∖ Set.singleton(x1), x1) = is_limit_point_of_set(x0, x1) }(Set.singleton(a), x)
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_eps_adherent_to_set(x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ x0 and k0.is_close(x1, x2) } }(t, x, 1)
not y ∈ Set.singleton(a) ∖ Set.singleton(x) or (y ∈ Set.singleton(a) and not y ∈ Set.singleton(x))
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.singleton[T0](x0) = (x0 = x1) }[Real](a, y)
not y ∈ Set.singleton(a) ∖ Set.singleton(x) or (y ∈ Set.singleton(a) and not y ∈ Set.singleton(x))
not is_adherent_point_of_set(t, x) or not eps2.is_positive

goal: exists(k0: Real) { t.contains(k0) and k0.is_close(x, eps2) }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_eps_adherent_to_set(x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ x0 and k0.is_close(x1, x2) } }(t, x, eps2)
not z ∈ Set.singleton(a) ∖ Set.singleton(x) or (z ∈ Set.singleton(a) and not z ∈ Set.singleton(x))
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.singleton[T0](x0) = (x0 = x1) }[Real](a, z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(a, x, eps2)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Real](eps2, (a - x).abs)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](eps2, (a - x).abs)
